headline: Comcast Business Makes Cybersecurity Simple for Small Businesses with Nationwide Launch of SecurityEdge™ Preferred
summary: PHILADELPHIA, June 11, 2026--Comcast Business, the nation’s largest provider of connectivity to small businesses, today announced the nationwide availability of SecurityEdge™ Preferred, its most advanced, network-native cybersecurity solution for small businesses – and the most comprehensive cybersecurity solution for small businesses at the best price.

headline: Reliable, High-Speed Internet from Xfinity Now Available in Farmington, New Hampshire
summary: PORTSMOUTH, N.H., June 11, 2026--More than 2,300 new homes and businesses in Farmington, New Hampshire now have access to multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network. Xfinity brings Internet, mobile, entertainment, and smart home services into one simple, seamless solution – giving customers more speed, savings, and control over their connected lives. headline: Comcast to Host Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
summary: PHILADELPHIA, June 11, 2026--Comcast Corporation will host a conference call with the financial community to discuss financial results for the second quarter on Thursday, July 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). Comcast will issue a press release reporting its results earlier that morning.

headline: World Cup Economics: How Much Boost Could The US Get?
summary: Bank of America says the 2026 World Cup could add 0.6% to U.S. GDP this year — and the hiring boost already showed up in May jobs.
